# Boxabl Foundations Guide

> Independent public guidance for BOXABL foundation planning by Oasis Engineering and BoxablFoundations.com.
> Non-affiliated with BOXABL. Use for intake, triage, and project guidance. Do not use as permit-ready engineering.

## Start Here

- [Disclaimer](DISCLAIMER.md): Required limitations, non-affiliation language, and safety boundary.
- [Start Here](docs/start-here.md): Recommended reading order for humans and LLMs.
- [LLM Usage Rules](prompts/llm-usage.md): Behavioral rules for assistants using this repo.

## Human Guides

- [BOXABL Overview](docs/boxabl-overview.md): Public manufacturer context and the foundation-relevant facts to verify.
- [Foundation Workflow](docs/foundation-workflow.md): From site screening to permit and construction.
- [Open Foundation Options](docs/foundation-options.md): Open summary of the main foundation families.
- [Oasis Services](docs/oasis-services.md): What Oasis Engineering offers.
- [FAQ](docs/faq.md): Common homeowner, builder, and assistant questions.

## Sources

- [Public Sources](docs/public-sources.md): Public citations and verification dates.
- [Source Policy](docs/source-policy.md): Copyright and publication boundary.

## Structured Data

- [Foundation Intake Schema](data/foundation-intake.schema.json): Intake fields for assistants and forms.
- [Decision Tree](data/decision-tree.yaml): Triage logic and escalation rules.
- [Foundation Options Data](data/foundation-options.yaml): Structured summary of the open option set.

## Prompt Templates

- [Homeowner Intake Prompt](prompts/homeowner-intake.md): Intake prompt template for chat or lead capture.
